channel.title: Forza Horizon 6 Guide — Horizon Japan
channel.description: A strategy guide for Forza Horizon 6 — cars, barn finds, treasure cars, aftermarket & Forza Edition cars, the Estate, the interactive Japan map, and a beginner's path to Horizon Legend.

item.title: Forza Horizon 6 Guide
item.description: A strategy guide for Forza Horizon 6 — cars, barn finds, treasure cars, aftermarket & Forza Edition cars, the Estate, the interactive Japan map, and a beginner's path to Horizon Legend.

item.title: Cars List
item.description: Forza Horizon 6 launches with 550+ cars [WIKI]. The first group lists vehicles confirmed directly by Wikipedia (key-art cover car and the cross-title loyalty rewards). The remaining groups are drawn from community guides (IGN, GamesRadar, Reddit) and are clearly marked as community-sourced.

item.title: Best Cars
item.description: There is no single 'best' car — it depends on the job. Below are strong, sourced picks for each discipline, drawn from the walkthrough reward cars and reviewer recommendations.

item.title: Interactive Map — Regions of Japan
item.description: Forza Horizon 6 is set in a fictionalised Japan with the largest open-world map in the series [WIKI]. The areas below are named in Wikipedia; community guides report the full map spans 10 regions — we list what is encyclopaedically confirmed and clearly mark the rest.

item.title: Beginner's Guide — Path to Horizon Legend
item.description: New to Horizon Japan? Follow this path — distilled from the Reddit no-spoiler guide, RedBull tips, Polygon's 10 tips, and the official First Drive, cross-checked against Wikipedia's confirmed systems.

item.title: Barn Finds
item.description: Barn Finds are reported by community guides as classic cars abandoned in barns across Japan, gated behind your Discover Japan stamps. Note: Wikipedia does not confirm this mechanic or its count.

item.title: Treasure Cars
item.description: Treasure Cars are reported by community guides as abandoned vehicles hidden across the map, found only via photo clues (no map marker until discovered). Note: Wikipedia does not confirm this mechanic or its count.

item.title: Aftermarket Cars
item.description: Aftermarket Cars are secondhand vehicles scattered across the map. They match your current campaign progression, come fully tuned with kits, and cost less than the Autoshow. (Wikipedia confirms deep car customisation but does not define this specific system; details below are community-sourced.)

item.title: Forza Edition Cars
item.description: Forza Edition (FE) cars are rare, specially-tuned variants found on the road and as rewards. Wikipedia does not confirm this category; the examples below are community-sourced.

item.title: Houses & Property
item.description: Forza Horizon 6 features player property. Wikipedia confirms one headline customisable property — the Estate, a mountainside plot in rural Japan you build and decorate [WIKI]. Community guides list additional houses, but Wikipedia does not enumerate them. Important correction: the "8" figure some guides cite refers to Garages (car-display and fast-travel points), not houses [WIKI].
